confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Forecast cache reuses stale data after location switches
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Changed ForecastMemoryCache to single-entry semantics so selecting A, then B, then A requires a fresh A fetch.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Hourly chart can show today's first 48 hours instead of next 48 hours
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Added forecast_hours=48 to the Open-Meteo request and asserted it in tests.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Forecast UI behavior is implemented but not directly tested
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Added ForecastPanelView render-level test for cards, chart section, sun note, comfort text, and weekend highlight.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: FR-FORECAST-01 test does not assert all required API fields
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Expanded URL-builder test to assert the full daily field set plus forecast_hours=48.

residualRisks: Direct Open-Meteo browser request exposes selected coordinates and visitor IP to Open-Meteo.
Selected city URL params are low-sensitivity but shareable.
npm audit reported moderate dependency advisories through the existing Next/PostCSS tree.
